scripts.dev:all: npm run build -w @fastfood/catalogos-core && concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w backend" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:3000 -t 120000 && npm run dev -w web"
scripts.dev:backend: npm run build -w @fastfood/catalogos-core && npm run dev -w backend
scripts.build: npm run build -w @fastfood/catalogos-core && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w web
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w web
